user.name: Hadia Naveed
user.headline: Frontend lead & design systems engineer
user.bio_short: Frontend lead and design-systems engineer building tools that turn structured data into beautiful surfaces.
user.bio_long: Frontend lead with nine years building products at the seam of design and engineering. Currently shipping a donor management platform at Givency; previously at Pulse and Studio X. I care most about the slow, careful work — design systems, accessibility, performance budgets, and the quiet polish that makes products feel intentional.

projects.title: Givency
projects.description: B2B SaaS for nonprofits to manage recurring donor relationships, cohort retention, and board reporting.

projects.title: create-profolyo-app
projects.tagline: CLI to scaffold self-hosted Profolyo with custom branding
projects.description: Open-source command-line tool for spinning up a self-hosted Profolyo instance.

projects.title: Pulse
projects.tagline: Real-time metrics dashboard for ops teams
projects.description: Live dashboard for operations teams. Sunset January 2025 after acquisition.

projects.title: Field Notes
projects.description: Lightweight Markdown CMS with git-backed storage, built for engineering docs.

projects.title: Lumen
projects.tagline: Tiny privacy-first analytics for indie hackers
projects.description: Sub-1KB analytics script. No cookies. Ships event data to your own database.

projects.title: Cohort
projects.description: An internal Givency tool that became a customer feature. Cohort-style retention curves for recurring donors.

experience.title: Frontend Lead
experience.description: Owned design system, accessibility, and frontend performance for the donor-management product.
highlights: Built the editor with Tiptap and DnD-Kit; shipped weekly for 18 months.
Migrated marketing site to App Router; cut TBT by 62%.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Built the real-time metrics dashboard from prototype to acquisition.
highlights: Designed WebSocket-backed live charts handling 10k events/sec.
Co-led migration from Vue 2 to Vue 3 with zero downtime.

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
experience.description: Agency work for SaaS and fintech clients across Pakistan and the Gulf.

experience.title: Designer & Developer
experience.description: WordPress, Shopify, and the occasional brand identity for early-stage clients.
